changeSet.author: pkomena

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE description = 'Pus'

changeSet.comment: Associer Hématies/Leucocytes (Etat frais Quantitatif) au type d'échantillon Pus (sampletype_test)
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.sampletype_test (id, sample_type_id, test_id) SELECT nextval('clinlims.sample_type_test_seq'), tos.id, t.id FROM clinlims.type_of_sample tos CROSS JOIN clinlims.test t WHERE tos.description = 'Pus' AND t.name IN ( 'Microscopie - Etat frais Quantitatif - Hématies', 'Microscopie - Etat frais Quantitatif - Leucocytes' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.sampletype_test st WHERE st.sample_type_id = tos.id AND st.test_id = t.id );
